name: agent-harness-generator
description: OpenHarness — mint a custom AI agent harness from any repo. Paste a GitHub URL or start blank; output runs on Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, pi.dev, Hermes, OpenClaw, or RVM. WASM kernel (Rust → wasm-bindgen + NAPI-RS), 6 hosts, witness-signed Ed25519 releases, GCP Secret Manager validation. Browser Studio + `npx openharness` CLI.

commands.name: create-harness
commands.description: Scaffold a new AI agent harness in the current directory

commands.name: publish-harness
commands.description: Smoke-test + witness-sign + npm publish for a generated harness

commands.name: validate-harness
commands.description: Release-readiness umbrella: doctor + verify + path-guard + mcp + secrets

commands.name: harness-secrets
commands.description: GCP Secret Manager helpers — check / fetch / validate-token

commands.name: verify-witness
commands.description: Verify the Ed25519 witness manifest of a scaffolded harness

commands.name: upgrade-harness
commands.description: Drift detection + apply against the latest generator template (--apply opt-in)

commands.name: diag-harness
commands.description: Kernel-version skew check (ADR-027). Surfaces manifest kernel + installed kernel + verdict with copy-pasteable next step. --json for CI gating; --bundle (iter 90) emits a full support-ticket JSON (sanitised manifest + deps + env).

commands.name: compare-harnesses
commands.description: Diff two scaffolded harnesses: manifest meta + host list + per-file SHA-256 fingerprints. Exit 0 IDENTICAL, 1 DRIFT, 2 missing manifest. --bundle emits ADR-031 schema-1 JSON for CI.

commands.name: repo-genome
commands.description: 7-section readiness scorecard for a LOCAL repo — repo type, agent topology, MCP risk, test confidence, release readiness, recommended plan, scorecard. The 'is this repo READY for a harness?' question (iter 110).

commands.name: score-harness
commands.description: 5-dimension 0-100 harness scorecard with 6-field badge block (score + mcpRisk + 4 booleans). Grade A/B/C/F. Target: A (>=85) without manual edits (iter 111).

commands.name: threat-model
commands.description: MCP threat-model artifact for PR / compliance review — allowed/denied tools, dangerous perms, secrets reachability, network/shell/file-write grants, default-deny posture (iter 112, 'enterprise gold').
